_comment_purpose: Per-repo MCP configuration for Claude Code (CLI + web). Auto-loaded when Claude Code opens this repo. See Holly_Migration_Plan_v6000.md §8 for context.
_comment_secret: SUPABASE_PAT must be set as a project-level environment variable in the Claude Code web UI (Settings → Project → Environment Variables) OR exported in the shell for CLI use. NEVER commit the PAT itself to this file.
_comment_scoping: project_ref in the URL pins each MCP entry to a single Supabase project. The same PAT is account-wide and works for all your projects, but project_ref enforces the boundary at the MCP layer so a session for one project cannot touch another.
_comment_readwrite: Two entries per project. Day-to-day work uses the read-only entry. Migrations and Edge Function deploys explicitly invoke tools from the -write entry. This prevents accidental mutation during exploratory work.

supabase-holly-v6._comment: v6 commercial product. Project does not exist yet — fill in project_ref after Phase 0 step 1 (create Supabase project for the Holly commercial line).

supabase-holly-v6-write._comment: WRITE access to v6 project. Use only when applying migrations or deploying Edge Functions. Ask before invoking.
